feature_descriptions.is_ramadan: Inside Ramadan window — fasting changes admissions for GI / dehydration cases.
feature_descriptions.is_eid_fitr: Eid-ul-Fitr days — typically lower elective volume, higher accident/festive injuries.
feature_descriptions.is_eid_adha: Eid-ul-Adha days — spike in zoonotic & meat-related GI cases.
feature_descriptions.is_muharram: Muharram days — public processions, trauma cases rise.
feature_descriptions.days_to_eid_fitr: Distance to nearest Eid-ul-Fitr — pre-Eid stocking demand.
feature_descriptions.days_to_ramadan: Signed days to nearest Ramadan start (Lahore).
feature_descriptions.inflation_idx: Pakistan CPI YoY % proxy — affects patient affordability.
feature_descriptions.lahore_temp_c: Lahore monthly mean temperature (°C, PMD normals).
feature_descriptions.lahore_rain_mm: Lahore monthly rainfall (mm) — peaks in monsoon Jul-Aug.
feature_descriptions.lahore_aqi: Lahore PM2.5 / smog index — peaks Nov-Dec, drives respiratory demand.
feature_descriptions.is_friday: Friday — half-day in PK, OPD volume drops.
feature_descriptions.lag_14: Demand same weekday two weeks ago.
feature_descriptions.lag_28: Demand same weekday four weeks ago (monthly cycle).
feature_descriptions.medicine_avg: Historical mean demand for this medicine.
feature_descriptions.doy_sin: Sine of day-of-year — captures smooth annual seasonality.
feature_descriptions.doy_cos: Cosine of day-of-year — captures smooth annual seasonality.
feature_descriptions.month_sin: Sine of month — captures smooth monthly seasonality.
feature_descriptions.month_cos: Cosine of month — captures smooth monthly seasonality.
feature_descriptions.dow_sin: Sine of day-of-week — captures smooth weekly cycle.
feature_descriptions.dow_cos: Cosine of day-of-week — captures smooth weekly cycle.
